notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the cockpit-podman SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.8. It addresses 39 CVEs: CVE-2020-10756, CVE-2021-3592, CVE-2021-3593, CVE-2021-3594, CVE-2021-3595, and 34 more.
